calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-28-2008 Off Calendar

Hearing On Petition To Approve Compromise Of A Disputed Claim Of A Minor.
Off Calendar Jun-19-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for hearing on the First Amended Petition to Approve the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Carl Sauceda, CSR #2031.

Susan Lynda Holland, Esq. appeared with petitioner Monica Lee, who was present as Guardian ad litem for Joi Rubit, a minor Claimant.
Petitioner was placed under oath and examined.

On the basis of evidence received, and good cause appearing, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.

Settlement Amount - $15,000.00.
Attorney's Fees - $3,750.00.
Medical Expenses - $950.00.
Costs - $153.96.

A net balance of $10,146.04 shall be deposited into a blocked account with Citibank, located at 216 Rhode Island Street, San Francisco, CA. No withdrawals shall be made without a written Court Order, or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.

Orders Approving the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of a Minor, and to Deposit Money into a Blocked Account, were submitted to and signed by the Court.
